error_signature: workflow stops when RSS feed fails
title: Workflow stops due to RSS feed errors
symptom: The workflow halts when an RSS feed fails to process, preventing subsequent feeds from being parsed.
applies_when: Using RSS Read or Remove Duplicate nodes
Multiple RSS feeds defined in an array
not_this_if: Error handling settings are configured to continue on error
root_cause: By default, n8n workflows stop execution when an error occurs in any node. This behavior can lead to incomplete processing of multiple items, especially in loops where one failure can halt the entire workflow.
fix_steps: Open the settings for the RSS Read or Remove Duplicate node.
Change the error handling setting from 'Stop Workflow' to 'Continue' or 'Continue (using error output)'.
Enable the 'Always Output Data' option to ensure the workflow continues even if no items are returned.
agent_instruction: Adjust the error handling settings in the RSS nodes to allow the workflow to continue processing.
